en: That's insane! I mean, just because you know Max has a small penis...
God! Just don't! You are kidding me.
I'm sorry. I can't do this if it means tearing down the Arcadian. It's an architectural landmark.
ko: 미안하지만 아카디안을 허물게 된다면 이건 할 수 없어.

en: New is always better, Ted. That's the rule. Just like bigger is always better.
ko: 새로운 게 항상 더 나아, 테드.

en: That's not true. Sometimes smaller is better.
Hey, look how big my cell phone is.
ko: 이봐, 내 휴대폰이 얼마나 큰지 봐.

en: You'll hear people say that. Oh, so you want something compact and efficient that fits comfortably in your pocket,
and I think Max is just a great guy.
ko: 그리고 나는 맥스가 정말 좋은 사람이라고 생각해.

en: Lily told you. Told him what? Max has a small penis.
Gah! How can you speak of such things?
ko: 그런 얘기를 어떻게 할 수 있어?

en: Girls talk about everything. Size, shape, left to right leaning orientation,
length, resemblance to a historical figure such as Winston Churchill. Yes, that's one of you.
ko: 길이, 윈스턴 처칠 같은 역사적 인물과의 유사성.

en: Girth, brooming. How can you speak of such things? You're kidding.
ko: 그런 얘기를 어떻게 할 수 있어?

en: Barney, every time I mention a woman you don't know, the first thing you say is boobs.
ko: 바니, 내가 모르는 여자를 언급할 때마다 네가 제일 먼저 하는 말은 가슴이야.

en: Not the complete sentence, does she have big boobs, which also would not be great.
